results.title: Add Single Product to Cart
results.notes: Added Hot Portable Digital Camera from catalog, cart badge updated to 1

results.title: Add Product from Category Page
results.notes: Added product from Printers category listing via quantity stepper

results.title: Add Product from Product Detail Page
results.notes: Added from PDP using increase quantity button, cart badge updated correctly

results.title: Add Product Variation to Cart
results.notes: Xerox 3225 product page: added VAR ($46.00) and GIFT+ ($319.00) variations separately. Sidebar showed 'Variations in cart: 2', cart badge updated to 2

results.title: Add Multiple Quantities
results.notes: Increased quantity to 3 using stepper, cart total recalculated correctly

results.title: View Cart Page
results.notes: Cart page displays product image, name, properties, price, quantity stepper, total, and order summary sidebar

results.title: Increase Quantity in Cart
results.notes: Used stepper increment button on cart page, line total and subtotal recalculated

results.title: Direct Quantity Input
results.notes: Used Ctrl+A then typed new value in spinbutton. Quantity updated, totals recalculated. Note: Vue spinbutton requires keyboard select-all, not input.select()

results.title: Remove Item - Single Product
results.notes: Clicked remove button, item removed immediately, cart shows empty state when last item removed

results.title: Save for Later
results.notes: Save for later button present and functional on cart line items

results.title: Clear Cart - All Items
results.notes: Clear cart button triggered confirmation dialog 'Do you want to clear your cart?' with Yes/No. Clicking Yes cleared all items, cart shows empty state with 'Continue shopping' and 'Add with bulk order' links

results.title: Cart Empty State
results.notes: Empty cart shows 'Your cart is empty' message, 'Use the search to find everything you need', Continue shopping link, Add with bulk order link

results.title: Cart Item Properties Display
results.notes: Vintage Colorado Hoodie shows properties: Size=55, Product color=Malachite. Xerox variations show Color property

results.title: Valid Coupon Code
results.notes: No known valid coupon code available in test environment. Promo code field and Apply button are present and functional

results.title: Invalid Coupon Code
results.notes: Entered 'FAKECODE', clicked Apply, error message displayed. Vue Apollo warning in console (expected for invalid coupon)

results.title: Cart Badge Count
results.notes: Cart badge in header accurately reflects item count. Shows '1', '2', '3' etc. Disappears when cart is empty

results.title: Cart Subtotal Calculation
results.notes: Subtotal correctly sums line totals (price x quantity for each item)

results.title: Order Summary Display
results.notes: Order summary sidebar shows Subtotal, Discount, Tax, Shipping cost, Total. All values update when cart changes

results.title: Checkout Page Layout
results.notes: Single-page checkout with sections: Cart items, Shipping details (Pickup/Shipping toggle, address, delivery method), Payment details (billing address, payment method, card form), Order comment, Order summary sidebar

results.title: Select Existing Shipping Address
results.notes: Address selection dialog opened with table of saved addresses. Selected Detroit address, billing auto-synced via 'Same as shipping address' checkbox

results.title: Select Delivery Method
results.notes: Delivery method dropdown shows Fixed Rate (Ground) and Fixed Rate (Air). Selection updates shipping cost and total in order summary

results.title: Select Payment Method
results.notes: 6 payment methods available: Authorize.Net, CyberSource, Datatrans, Manual, Pay with points, Skyflow. Selecting CyberSource shows card form with iframes for card number and CVV

results.title: Fill CyberSource Payment Card
results.notes: Card number and CVV fields are cross-origin iframes (CyberSource hosted). Cardholder name and expiry are regular inputs. Card: 4622943127013705

results.title: Order Comment
results.notes: Order comment textarea with 0/1000 character counter. Accepts input correctly

results.title: Place Order - Double Submit Prevention
results.notes: BL-CHK-003 verified: Place Order button disables after first click, preventing duplicate order submission

results.title: Order Confirmation
results.notes: After placing order, redirected to confirmation page showing order number CO260309-00007, status 'Payment required' (expected for CyberSource B2B), View order button

results.title: Order Appears in History
results.notes: Order CO260309-00007 visible in /account/orders with correct date, status, and total ($539.96)

results.title: Order Detail Page
results.notes: Order detail shows product info, quantities, prices, billing/shipping addresses, payment method, status, Print order button, Pay now button for payment-required orders

results.title: Validation - Missing Shipping Address
results.notes: Place Order disabled when no shipping address selected. Message: 'Complete all required information to proceed'

results.title: Validation - Missing Delivery Method
results.notes: Place Order disabled when shipping address selected but delivery method not chosen

results.title: Validation - Missing Payment Method
results.notes: Place Order disabled when address and delivery selected but payment method not chosen

results.title: Validation - Payment Card Required
results.notes: Place Order disabled when CyberSource selected but card details not filled. User agreement and Privacy policy links present

results.title: Billing Address Same as Shipping
results.notes: Checkbox 'Same as shipping address' checked by default. Billing address auto-populates from shipping address selection

results.title: Request Quote from Cart
results.notes: Clicked 'Add cart items to quote' button on cart page. Created RFQ260309-00002. Cart items transferred to quote. Quote edit page shows product, addresses, comment field, file upload section

results.title: Submit Quote Request
results.notes: Added comment and clicked Submit. Quote RFQ260309-00002 moved to 'Processing' status. Success notification displayed. Cart cleared after quote submission

consoleErrors.impact: Broken image reference in Saved for Later section, non-blocking

observations: CyberSource payment results in 'Payment required' order status (expected B2B behavior - payment capture happens separately)
Quote submission via 'Add cart items to quote' clears the cart after creating the quote
Cart uses Vue spinbutton component, not standard HTML input - select() method not available, use Ctrl+A instead
6 payment providers configured: Authorize.Net, CyberSource, Datatrans, Manual, Pay with points, Skyflow
2 delivery methods available: Fixed Rate (Ground) and Fixed Rate (Air)
Order comment field has 1000 character limit with live counter
notExecuted: CART-019 to CART-027: Cart persistence and validation edge cases (back button, refresh, multi-tab)
CHK-002: Enter New Shipping Address (form fields)
CHK-014 to CHK-021: Guest Checkout (requires anonymous/incognito - not available in this browser session)
CHK-023 to CHK-025: Order Status tracking via Admin
CHK-030: Checkout with empty required fields submission attempt
CHK-031 to CHK-038: B2B Checkout (PO Number, Net 30, Approval workflow, Org Address, Contract Pricing)
CHK-039 to CHK-042: Reorder functionality (no completed orders available to test reorder)
CHK-044 to CHK-046: Separate Billing Address entry
QUOTE-003 to QUOTE-015: Extended Quote/RFQ tests (quote details, modify, cancel, accept, decline, negotiate)
